title: Regular Animations (Similar to jumping holiday snowman)

posts.author: masonmay (Mason May)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would love to see regular updated animations throughout the year, similar to the jumping holiday snowman.

Not a huge feature, but everyone in my company loves the seasonal animations every year, and it’s definitely a mood booster.

There could be a feature to turn it off, as well. I think this would be a great feature to those who have to sit behind the computer all day long!
